config.name: Treasury Stability: Reserve Deployment Policy
config.hypothesis: An intermediate treasury overflow threshold (0.30-0.50) maximizes population stability and minimizes inequality, while extremes — aggressive deployment or passive hoarding — degrade outcomes

findings: Treasury ratio: 0.0044 at aggressive deployment (0.10) vs 0.0008 at hoarding (0.90) (-81.1%)
Peak population stability at overflow_threshold = 0.40 (mean pop: 48.9)
Gini coefficient: 0.5325 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.5527 at hoarding (0.90) (+3.8%)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean fitness: 0.5409 at aggressive deployment vs 0.5448 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.76 at deployment vs 6.83 at hoarding
Birth/death ratio: 1.1019 at deployment vs 1.2435 at hoarding
